overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a gothic castle interior. The player ascends a stone staircase and walks through a grand hallway lined with suits of armor, tapestries, and medieval exhibits, encountering other student characters before ascending another staircase into a darker upper level.

events.description: approaching the metal gate archway at the top of the staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase toward the hallway entrance

entered.detail: worn stone steps with dark edges ascending in a spiral
high vaulted ceiling with ribbed stone arches
rough-hewn grey stone blocks with mortar lines
rough-hewn grey stone blocks with wooden handrail mounted
dark polished wooden rail with metal brackets
medieval-style iron wall lamp with glass enclosure
ornate iron gate with decorative scrollwork at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a narrow stone staircase within a castle tower, with rough stone walls and a wooden handrail. The camera moves steadily upward toward an ornate metal gate archway visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle corridor with armor exhibits

events.description: passing through the metal gate archway into the grand hallway
passing the large stone troll statue display on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hallway observing medieval armor exhibits and statues

entered.detail: colorful medieval coat of arms mounted on the stone wall
full plate armor standing on display pedestal
massive stone sculpture of a troll holding a club
dark timber beams spanning the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: Passing through the metal gate, the scene opens into a wide castle corridor with wooden ceiling beams. The player walks past suits of armor and colorful heraldic shields mounted on the walls, approaching a large stone troll statue standing on the left side.

events.description: turning slightly to view the knight on horseback tapestry display

agents.ego_description: walking past various suits of armor and tapestry displays while looking at exhibits

entered.detail: diorama of armored knight on horse in glass case with forest backdrop
tall wooden-framed glass cabinet containing historical artifacts
long hanging tapestry with red and gold heraldic patterns

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the corridor, the player passes a detailed knight-on-horseback display in a glass case. The hallway features polished floors, wooden ceiling beams, and various suits of armor standing against the stone walls.

events.description: other students in dark robes enter the hallway and walk alongside the player

agents.ego_description: walking through the hallway alongside other students in school robes

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with red scarf walking ahead of the player
student in dark robes walking in the same direction alongside the player

entered.detail: large antique wooden trunk with metal bands sitting against the wall
tall iron gate with vertical bars blocking the staircase ahead

segments.scene_description: The corridor becomes populated with other students walking in the same direction. The player follows behind a student in dark robes while approaching a metal gate at the far end of the hallway. A large wooden chest sits against the left wall near the gate.

events.description: passing through the metal gate into the ascending staircase
entering darker area with wooden beam ceiling and warm wall lanterns

agents.ego_description: ascending the gated staircase into a darker upper level of the castle

entered.detail: steep stone steps leading upward into a darker tower section
heavy dark timber beams with hanging iron lanterns
lit medieval lantern casting warm orange light on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the metal gate and begins ascending another stone staircase. The environment becomes darker with heavy wooden ceiling beams and warm wall lanterns replacing the brighter corridor. The stone walls close in as the ascent continues into the upper castle levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a narrow tower staircase into a grand castle corridor before climbing toward a darker upper level. It begins by moving steadily up a stone staircase with a wooden handrail, passing through an ornate metal gate that opens into a wide hallway characterized by wooden ceiling beams and heraldic shields. As the camera progresses through the corridor, it glides past suits of armor and a stone troll statue before passing a knight-on-horseback display in a glass case. The scene then shifts as the player follows other students in dark robes toward a second metal gate, passing a large wooden chest along the wall. Finally, the camera passes through the gate and ascends another stone staircase, where the bright corridor gives way to a more enclosed environment lit by warm wall lanterns under heavy wooden beams.
